name: Semantic Scholar MCP
description: Searches millions of academic papers on Semantic Scholar and arXiv with citation analysis and full-text PDF extraction. No API key required.

skills.name: Paper Search
skills.description: Searches Semantic Scholar, arXiv, PubMed, bioRxiv, Google Scholar, and IACR for academic papers using natural language.

skills.name: Citation Analysis
skills.description: Retrieves citation graphs, reference lists, and co-author networks for any academic paper from Semantic Scholar.

skills.name: PDF Extraction
skills.description: Downloads and extracts full text from arXiv and open-access PDFs for deep reading without leaving the agent context.
